# GovInfo API - Data Agreement

## Provider
Government Publishing Office (GPO)

## URL
https://api.govinfo.gov/

## Terms of Service URL
https://www.govinfo.gov/about (terms referenced on about page)

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Federal government publications including the Congressional Record, Federal Register, Code of Federal Regulations, US Code, court opinions, GAO reports, and budget documents via the GovInfo API.

## How We Use It
Government publication data used as a regulatory and policy signal in DRM3 products. Provides access to the full text and metadata of official government documents for analysis and enrichment.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. Best practice: cite "GovInfo, U.S. Government Publishing Office" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
- API key required (free, obtained via registration at api.data.gov)
- 1,000 requests per hour per API key (default tier)
- Higher limits available on request

## Key Restrictions
- Must register for a free API key
- API key must not be shared publicly
- Do not misrepresent derived content as official government publications

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
